title: Record soft33 async22 and micro40 densify
prompt: Create reports/soft33-async22-micro40.md with sections for Soft 33, Async 22, Micro 40, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft33 Async22 Micro40 Contract

## Soft 33
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.33 with quality bias floor 0.31 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Async 22
async pre-rot and swarm micro pressure default to 0.22 so reclaim starts earlier

## Micro 40
micro minContextUsageRatio defaults to 0.40 and minContentTokens to 4 so tool-result clearing starts earlier

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
